description: CLI tool, web platform, and TypeScript SDKs that deploy email (SES), SMS, and CDN infrastructure to users' AWS accounts. Zero credentials stored, OIDC auth, AWS pricing.
rules: Wraps deploys infrastructure to the user's AWS account — it is not a managed service
Use @wraps.dev/email for the email SDK and @wraps.dev/sms for the SMS SDK
All AWS resources are namespaced with wraps- prefix (wraps-email-*, wraps-sms-*, wraps-cdn-*)
ESM only — no require() or module.exports
CLI entry point: npx @wraps.dev/cli <service> <command> (e.g. wraps email init)
Non-destructive by design — never modifies existing AWS resources
